behavior: Versioned contracts, synthetic evals, typed-job evidence, deterministic file input, and budgets fail closed.
revision_scope: The clean committed Milestone 1 implementation before the evidence-only Gate 1 state transition.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-domain --all-features
commands.relevant_result: All 96 domain tests and 5 documentation tests passed, including fail-closed contracts, compatibility fixtures, privacy boundaries, manifests, model provenance, and vector freshness.
commands.caveat: Live credential-store integration was intentionally disabled; this crate does not need it.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-domain v3_evaluation
commands.relevant_result: All 13 evaluation tests passed across the 11 frozen categories, including duplicate-observation, polarity, veteran evidence, protected-answer, and commercial-comparison checks.
commands.caveat: Fixtures are synthetic and local. They contain no personal data and invoke no external AI.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-storage health::tracking::tests
commands.relevant_result: All 3 focused storage health tests passed for startup interruption recovery and exactly-once terminal audit transitions.
commands.caveat: The tests use isolated databases and do not invoke an operating-system credential store.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-application scheduler::workers::scrapers::tests
commands.relevant_result: All 11 focused scraper-runner tests passed for audit admission, shutdown boundaries, partial results, timeouts, terminal failures, and sanitized diagnostics.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-application failed_notification_is_not_retried_automatically
commands.relevant_result: The focused notification test proved a failed or ambiguous provider attempt remains claimed and is not duplicated.
commands.caveat: Per-channel durable retry remains a later storage concern; immediate delivery is explicitly at most once.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-application test_cycle_waiting_for_admission_stops_after_shutdown
commands.relevant_result: The queued-cycle test proved shutdown prevents new work after scrape-lock admission.
commands.caveat: The test uses a disabled-source configuration and cannot retrieve credentials.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel shutdown_before_bootstrap_cycle_prevents_work
commands.relevant_result: The focused desktop bootstrap test proved a sticky pre-cycle shutdown signal prevents scheduler work.
commands.caveat: No GUI or operating-system credential access occurs in this test.

commands.relevant_result: All 10 smoke journeys passed in 8,261.17 ms with no unexpected, flaky, or skipped tests.
commands.caveat: The enforced budget is at most 25 tests and 30,000 ms; this is the focused smoke lane, not the full release E2E lane.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS npm run tauri:build -- --debug --bundles app --ci --no-sign
commands.relevant_result: The current frontend and Rust desktop application built successfully as a debug macOS app bundle.
commands.caveat: The local smoke bundle is intentionally unsigned and is not release evidence.

commands.command: Computer Use installed-app smoke: finish isolated first run, open Resume Match, invoke Add Resume, cancel the native Open sheet, and exit
commands.relevant_result: The macOS native Open sheet appeared; no file was selected; cancel returned to No Resume Added with no retained path; no Keychain prompt appeared.
commands.caveat: The app used an ephemeral package-smoke root and database key. The host is macOS 27 arm64; Windows 11, macOS 26, and Linux live package proof remain release-matrix work.

commands.relevant_result: The single-active-feature transition, evidence binding, plan routing, architecture ownership, and startup budgets passed.
commands.caveat: Repository GitHub Actions remain temporarily disabled by user direction.

commands.command: npm run lint:sqlx && npm run lint:security && npm run lint:file-size && cargo fmt --all -- --check && git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: SQLx metadata, harness ownership, security boundaries, file-size hard limits, Rust formatting, and diff hygiene passed.
commands.caveat: Repository GitHub Actions remain temporarily disabled by user direction.

commands.command: node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs clippy -p jobsentinel-domain -p jobsentinel-storage -p jobsentinel-application -p jobsentinel --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
commands.relevant_result: The changed Rust owners passed Clippy with warnings denied.
commands.caveat: This focused owner set is Milestone 1 evidence, not the final release workspace lane.

decisions.compatibility: Freeze compatibility_line 3; accept typed pre-v3 objects for migration; refuse malformed, unsupported-newer, and unknown fields outside the explicit extensions map.
decisions.archive_envelopes: Backups are encrypted. Reviewed plaintext exports contain no secrets and require explicit user review.
decisions.privacy: Freeze local_only, external_ai_optional, sensitive, and public_data_only labels. Military service, clearance claims, and protected veteran answers remain typed protected categories outside external pack flows.
decisions.vectors: Use sqlite_blob_v1 with model and content provenance. Add no vector service or abstraction.
decisions.packs: V3.0 permits static content and reviewed typed workflows only. Generic script and dynamic adapter execution remain deferred.
decisions.a20: Defer the local runtime kernel. Existing application and Tokio owners satisfy typed-job scheduling, cancellation, recovery, observability, and resource-bound requirements.
decisions.notifications: Claim immediate delivery before provider invocation and never retry a failed or ambiguous attempt automatically, preventing duplicates until later durable per-channel retry design.
decisions.mutation_scope: Use focused hostile field, polarity, and duplicate-observation mutations to disprove fail-closed contract and evaluation behavior; do not run a broad low-signal mutation campaign.
decisions.credential_tests: Keep live keyring tests opt-in. Use isolated databases, fixed test vaults, or the package-smoke key path for unattended verification.

review.adversarial_verdict: PASS after duplicate-observation and scheduler lifecycle corrections
